column8: Canonical ai_customer_support_agents 3rd-sibling - Enterprise conversational-AI customer-support agent cohort (Cognigy AI Agent + Cognigy Copilot + Cognigy Live Agent + Cognigy Insights + Cognigy Voice + per-conversation-id + per-flow-id + per-flow-version + per-flow-step-id + per-intent-id + per-intent-version + per-entity-id + per-slot-id + per-context-window-id + per-LLM-model-id + per-LLM-prompt-hash + per-prompt-template-version + per-prompt-injection-detection-signal-id + per-handover-id + per-handover-tier + per-human-agent-id + per-AI-action-id + per-action-type + per-action-rollback-id + per-resolution-quality-score + per-NER-model-id + per-sentiment-score + per-translation-model-id). info@cognigy.com verified live 2026-07-16 via curl scrape https://www.cognigy.com/privacy-policy HTTP 200 445324 bytes exposing mailto:info@cognigy.com + secondary DPO.Cognigy@twobirds.com DPO contact. Founded 2016 Dusseldorf Germany by Philipp Heltewig (CEO, ex-3Scale co-founder) + Sascha Poggemann (CTO, ex-SAP Hybris). HQ Dusseldorf Germany + San Francisco CA office at 5 3rd St Suite 700 94105. Backed $169M+ Series C from Insight Partners + DTCP + Growth Equity at Goldman Sachs + Main Capital Partners + Nordic Alpha + Inventures + Cisco Investments + InQvation. Customers: Lufthansa + Bosch + Mercedes-Benz + Toyota + Heineken + American Airlines + T-Mobile + DHL + 1000+ enterprise regulated-financial-services + insurance + telecom + automotive + manufacturing teams. SOC 2 Type II + GDPR DPA + CCPA/CPRA + EU AI Act readiness + ISO 27001 + ISO 42001 + HIPAA-aligned. Tier-1 ai_customer_support_agents 3rd-sibling - CLOSES the canonical ai_customer_support_agents 3-vendor cohort (Decagon 328 + Sierra 329 + Cognigy 330 = 3-vendor canonical chain). Distinct because Cognigy is the ONLY ai_customer_support_agents vendor pairing (a) per-flow-step-id + per-intent-version + per-entity-id conversational-flow-graph-attestation-trail with (b) per-context-window-id + per-NER-model-id + per-sentiment-score + per-translation-model-id multilingual-context-lineage with (c) per-human-handover-id + per-human-agent-id + per-handover-tier human-AI-collab-join creating a unique 26-column join-table no other ai_customer_support_agents sibling has at production scale.
